nasb.text: “My beloved has gone down to his garden, To the beds of balsam, To pasture his flock in the gardens And gather lilies.

esv.text: My beloved has gone down to his garden to the beds of spices, to graze in the gardens and to gather lilies.

cnv.text: 我的良人下到自己的園中， 下到香花畦那裡， 在園內細賞， 採摘百合花。

ccb.text: 我的良人下到自己的园中， 在香草花圃中牧放他的羊群， 采集百合花。
